object_type: bounded counterexample target for PhaseFrontCharge nonreducibility

candidate_counterexample.goal: Find two DFM-MKC phase configurations with identical metric and stress-energy data but distinct phase-front winding charge.
candidate_counterexample.theta_1: periodic structural phase field theta_1 : M -> R / 2pi Z
candidate_counterexample.theta_2: periodic structural phase field theta_2 : M -> R / 2pi Z
shared_requirements: same closed loop gamma subset dark_front(t)

mathematical_mechanism_to_test: dtheta may carry winding data around closed loops
local stress-energy depends on local gradients and contractions
global winding may not be determined by local metric and stress-energy data alone
reduction_outcome: If no such pair can exist, record wall-strengthening theorem: PhaseFrontCharge is reducible to metric/stress/null-cone data under DFM-MKC V1 assumptions.
nonreduction_outcome: If such a pair exists, record PhaseFrontCharge as first isolated nonmetric DFM-MKC/SIDFH residual candidate.
guardrails: Does not claim the counterexample exists.
Only records the bounded counterexample target.
next_admissible_step: Prove existence or impossibility of same-g same-T_DFM_MKC different-PhaseFrontCharge configurations.
